topStories.description: Amit Shah says BJP targets illegal infiltrators, not Assam’s indigenous Muslims; accuses Congress of giving issue a communal spin ahead of polls

topStories.title: US lifts sanctions on Venezuelan interim leader Delcy Rodríguez
topStories.description: It is the latest sign of warming relations between the US and Venezuela after Nicolás Maduro was seized in a commando raid.

topStories.title: Wall Street Set For Mayhem? S&P, Nasdaq Futures Plunge As Trump Dashes Iran Ceasefire Hope
topStories.description: Tech-heavy Nasdaq futures drop nearly 2% as geopolitical tensions flare, signalling a gap-down start for the US stock market.

topStories.title: UK refuses to get dragged into US-Iran war, but is leading international effort to reopen Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has resisted involvement in the US-Israeli strikes against Iran, focusing instead on reopening the Strait of Hormuz. The UK is convening a coalition of nations to discuss restoring navigation in the strategic waterway amid rising global oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan to continue with Iran-US mediation despite ‘obstacles’
dailyNews.description: Islamabad's statement follows Trump threatening to bomb Iran 'back to the Stone Ages'.

dailyNews.title: Who is Kamal Kharazi? Former Iranian Foreign Minister ‘critically injured’ in US-Israeli strike on his home
dailyNews.description: Kamal Kharazi, ex-Iranian foreign minister, sustained serious injuries in a US-Israeli strike that also resulted in his wife's death. Kharazi, a key advisor to Iran's Supreme Leader, was involved in back-channel negotiations with the US, which critics say the attack aimed to sabotage.

dailyNews.title: Macron responds to Trump mocking his marriage: ‘Neither elegant nor up to standard’
dailyNews.description: During the lunch, Trump mimicked a French accent while commenting on Macron’s marriage: “I call up France, Macron – whose wife treats him extremely badly. Still recovering from the right to the jaw.”

dailyNews.title: ‘Bomb back to the Stone Age’: US history of threats and carpet bombing
dailyNews.description: Analysts say carpet bombing countries is a war crime. But it wouldn't be new for the US.

dailyNews.title: Macron calls Trump's remarks on his marriage 'inelegant'
dailyNews.description: French President Emmanuel Macron has said Donald Trump's comments about his marriage were "neither elegant nor up to standard".

dailyNews.title: US Company Recalls Chocolate Products Containing Erectile Dysfunction Drugs
dailyNews.description: A California-based company recalled chocolate products that contained "undeclared" pharmaceutical ingredients, sildenafil and tadalafil.

dailyNews.title: Smoke rises over Mashhad, Iran, following strike near airport
dailyNews.description: Footage shows columns of smoke rising over the Iranian city of Mashhad, after US-Israeli strikes near the airport.

dailyNews.title: Middle East war boosts EV demand; US, Europe car-selling platforms see surge in inquiries

dailyNews.title: US-Israeli attacks and its impact on Iran’s economy
dailyNews.description: US-Israeli attacks and its impact on Iran’s economy

dailyNews.title: Tim Tebow urges Supreme Court to make big tech 'protect kids over profit' in CSAM case
dailyNews.description: Tim Tebow urges the Supreme Court to hold social media platforms accountable for CSAM, saying big tech must 'protect kids over profit' amid rising exploitation.

dailyNews.title: Expert flags ‘disappointing’ questions from justices in Trump birthright citizenship case
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump’s executive order ending birthright citizenship for the children of illegal immigrants appears to be in jeopardy, according to a legal expert.

dailyNews.title: Grizzlies' Brandon Clarke arrested on drug trafficking, speeding charges in Arkansas
dailyNews.description: Memphis Grizzlies forward Brandon Clarke was arrested in Arkansas on charges including speeding, drug possession and trafficking a controlled substance.

dailyNews.title: Former Chicago Mayor Rahm Emanuel admits Democrats 'lost the plot' as a party on cultural issues
dailyNews.description: Rahm Emanuel says the Democratic Party became 'unanchored' from middle-class values, arguing it shifted from acceptance to advocacy on divisive cultural issues.

dailyNews.title: Passengers screamed 'turn around' as flames shot from Delta jet engine moments after takeoff
dailyNews.description: Passengers screamed as flames shot from an engine on Delta Flight 104 after takeoff from São Paulo. The plane landed safely with no injuries.

dailyNews.title: REP SUZAN DELBENE: Trump's tariffs are raising prices and American families are suffering
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's massive tariffs have cost American families over $1,700 and caused $34 billion in farm losses, with no relief in sight.

dailyNews.title: ICE nabs alleged machete-wielding MS-13 gangster wanted for murder: 'the witch'
dailyNews.description: ICE arrests MS-13 gangster known as 'the witch,' who is wanted in El Salvador for murder, after he was allegedly caught and released in California in 2023.

dailyNews.title: Jaden Ivey claims he was cut for preaching Gospel, claims Bulls' reason for release is a 'lie'
dailyNews.description: Former Chicago Bulls player Jaden Ivey pushed back on the reason why he was waived by the team, maintaining that it was for preaching the word of God.

dailyNews.title: MIKE DAVIS: Sanity must be restored to birthright citizenship
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court heard arguments in Trump v. Barbara on whether the Fourteenth Amendment grants birthright citizenship to children of illegal immigrants.

dailyNews.title: Trump Has Discussed Firing Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump has not made a final decision, but he has floated the idea of replacing Ms. Bondi with Lee Zeldin, the E.P.A. administrator.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Strait of Hormuz Is Not America’s Problem, and How Musk May Get Richer
dailyNews.description: Plus, does every middle schooler really need a laptop?

dailyNews.title: 5 Takeaways From Trump’s Address on Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump did not define a clear path out of the conflict, which he estimated would end within three weeks.

dailyNews.title: Every Trump Threat to Abandon NATO Hollows It Out
dailyNews.description: Doubts that the United States would come to the aid of NATO allies increase each time, prompting Europeans to consider an alliance without Washington.

dailyNews.title: Primetime Trump
dailyNews.description: We have takeaways from the president’s address to the nation.

dailyNews.title: Desi Lydic Wants Trump to Take a Hint About the Ballroom
dailyNews.description: “Might I suggest: If the ballroom starts experiencing ballistic assault, maybe we just cancel the ball?” she said on “The Daily Show.”

dailyNews.title: Gov. Whitmer seeks federal disaster declaration after deadly March 6 tornadoes
dailyNews.description: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer requested a major disaster declaration from President Donald Trump after tornadoes in Branch, Cass and St. Joseph counties killed four people and destroyed homes and businesses.

dailyNews.title: Can Trump really pull the U.S. out of NATO?
dailyNews.description: President Trump continues to slam the members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization for their lack of support in the Strait of Hormuz as the Iran war rages on. Jack Detsch, a defense reporter at POLITICO, joins CBS News with more insight.

dailyNews.title: Eye Opener: Trump addresses nation on Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump addresses the nation on the Iran war, but does not offer a definitive timeline on how the war could wrap up. Plus, NASA's historic Artemis II mission lifts off, sending astronauts on a journey around the moon. All that and all that matters in today's Eye Opener.

dailyNews.title: Fuel prices spike, markets slide after Trump's Iran address
dailyNews.description: President Trump addressed the Iran war, and the global economic response to his remarks is concerning. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices rise after Trump insists the Iran war is going to plan
dailyNews.description: One market analyst says Trump warning the Iran war will take 2-3 more weeks, without a plan to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, "was far less than" investors had hoped for.

dailyNews.title: Concern U.S. may deport Iranians held by ICE back home to a warzone
dailyNews.description: Two gay Iranian men seeking asylum in the U.S. could face execution if they're deported to Iran, a move the Trump administration has not ruled out.
